<type>file</type>
<content>1: #!/usr/bin/env node
2: 
3: import { config } from 'dotenv';
4: import { resolve } from 'path';
5: import { existsSync } from 'fs';
6: 
7: // Load .env from repo root or current directory
8: const envPaths = [
9:   resolve(process.cwd(), '.env'),
10:   resolve(process.cwd(), '..', '..', '.env'), // When run from packages/cli
11: ];
12: for (const envPath of envPaths) {
13:   if (existsSync(envPath)) {
14:     config({ path: envPath });
15:     break;
16:   }
17: }
18: 
19: import * as p from '@clack/prompts';
20: import { listCommand } from './commands/list.js';
21: import { watchCommand } from './commands/watch.js';
22: import { deployCheckpointCommand } from './commands/deploy/checkpoint.js';
23: import { resolveDeployCheckpointOptions } from './commands/deploy/checkpoint-options.js';
24: import { createWorkspaceCommand } from './commands/workspace/create.js';
25: import { showWorkspaceCommand } from './commands/workspace/show.js';
26: import { destroyWorkspaceCommand } from './commands/workspace/destroy.js';
27: import { listWorkspaceFilesCommand } from './commands/workspace/files.js';
28: import { catWorkspaceFileCommand } from './commands/workspace/cat.js';
29: import { workspaceDiffCommand } from './commands/workspace/diff.js';
30: import { workspaceDeployCommand } from './commands/workspace/deploy.js';
31: import { doctorCommand } from './commands/doctor.js';
32: import { parseArgs } from './lib/args.js';
33: 
34: const VERSION = '0.1.0';
35: 
36: function parsePositiveIntegerFlag(
37:   value: string | boolean | string[] | undefined
38: ): number | undefined {
39:   const raw = Array.isArray(value) ? value[value.length - 1] : value;
40:   if (typeof raw !== 'string') {
41:     return undefined;
42:   }
43: 
44:   const parsed = Number(raw);
45:   if (!Number.isFinite(parsed) || parsed <= 0) {
46:     return undefined;
47:   }
48: 
49:   return Math.floor(parsed);
50: }
51: 
52: function normalizeCliToken(token: string): { value: string; changed: boolean } {
53:   let value = token;
54:   value = value
55:     .replace(/[\u2018\u2019]/g, "'")
56:     .replace(/[\u201C\u201D]/g, '"');
57:   if (/^[\u2013\u2014]/.test(value)) {
58:     value = `--${value.slice(1)}`;
59:   }
60:   if ((value.startsWith('"') && value.endsWith('"')) || (value.startsWith("'") && value.endsWith("'"))) {
61:     value = value.slice(1, -1);
62:   }
63:   return { value, changed: value !== token };
64: }
65: 
66: function normalizeCliArgs(rawArgs: string[]): { args: string[]; changed: boolean } {
67:   const normalized: string[] = [];
68:   let changed = false;
69:   for (const token of rawArgs) {
70:     const next = normalizeCliToken(token);
71:     normalized.push(next.value);
72:     if (next.changed) {
73:       changed = true;
74:     }
75:   }
76:   return { args: normalized, changed };
77: }
78: 
79: function showHelp(): void {
80:   console.log(`
81: nimbus - Entire checkpoint deployment CLI
82: 
83: Usage:
84:   nimbus <command> [options]
85: 
86: Commands:
87:   doctor             Validate worker deploy readiness and migrations
88:   deploy checkpoint <checkpoint-id-or-commit-ish>
89:                       Resolve checkpoint/commit source and queue a deployment job
90:   workspace create <checkpoint-id-or-commit-ish>
91:                      Create a persistent sandbox workspace from checkpoint source
92:   workspace show <workspace-id>
93:                       Show workspace status and source metadata
94:   workspace destroy <workspace-id>
95:                       Destroy sandbox workspace and source bundle
96:   workspace files <workspace-id> [path]
97:                       List files in workspace at path (default: .)
98:   workspace cat <workspace-id> <path>
99:                       Read file content from workspace
100:   workspace diff <workspace-id>
101:                        Show workspace diff summary (use --include-patch for patch)
102:   workspace deploy <workspace-id>
103:                       Run deploy preflight, queue deploy, and poll status
104:   list               List all past jobs
105:   watch <job-id>     Watch a job's progress
106: 
107: Options:
108:   --ref <ref>        Resolution hint for checkpoint lookup
109:   --project-root <path>
110:                      Deploy project root override for monorepos
111:   --env-file <path>  Extra env file(s), comma-separated
112:   --env KEY=VALUE    Explicit env override (repeatable)
113:   --no-tests         Skip tests in checkpoint deploy metadata
114:   --no-build         Skip build in workspace deploy metadata
115:   --no-lint          Skip lint in checkpoint deploy metadata
116:   --no-watch         Disable follow-up watch guidance
117:   --include-patch    Include unified patch output for workspace diff
118:   --max-bytes <n>    Max bytes for diff/file output truncation
119:   --idempotency-key <key>
120:                      Stable idempotency key for workspace deploy retries
121:   --poll-interval-ms <n>
122:                      Poll interval for workspace deploy status checks
123:   --preflight-only   Run deploy preflight only (do not queue deploy)
124:   --auto-fix         Allow safe preflight/deploy remediations
125:   --no-dry-run       Upload source bundle and create checkpoint job
126:   -h, --help         Show this help message
127:   -v, --version      Show version
128: 
129: Examples:
130:   nimbus deploy checkpoint checkpoint:8a513f56ed70
131:   nimbus workspace create checkpoint:8a513f56ed70 --project-root apps/web
132:   nimbus workspace show ws_abc12345
133:   nimbus workspace files ws_abc12345 src
134:   nimbus workspace diff ws_abc12345 --include-patch --max-bytes 262144
135:   nimbus workspace deploy ws_abc12345
136:   nimbus workspace deploy ws_abc12345 --idempotency-key deploy-smoke-123 --auto-fix
137:   nimbus workspace deploy ws_abc12345 --preflight-only --no-tests --no-build
138:   nimbus doctor
139:   nimbus deploy checkpoint main~1 --project-root apps/web --env API_URL=https://api.example.com
140:   nimbus list
141:   nimbus watch job_abc123
142: 
143: Environment Variables:
144:   NIMBUS_WORKER_URL  Worker URL (required) - Your self-hosted Nimbus worker
145: 
146: Self-hosting: https://github.com/dayhaysoos/nimbus#self-hosting-guide
147: `);
148: }
149: 
150: async function main(): Promise<void> {
151:     const args = process.argv.slice(2);
152:     const normalized = normalizeCliArgs(args);
153:     try {
154:     const { command, flags, positional } = parseArgs(normalized.args);
155:     // Handle version flag
156:     if (flags.version || flags.v) {
157:       console.log(`nimbus v${VERSION}`);
158:       process.exit(0);
159:     }
160: 
161:     // Handle help flag
162:     if (flags.help || flags.h || !command) {
163:       showHelp();
164:       process.exit(command ? 0 : 1);
165:     }
166: 
167:     p.intro('@dayhaysoos/nimbus');
168: 
169:     if (normalized.changed) {
170:       p.log.warning('Detected smart punctuation in arguments; normalized to ASCII equivalents.');
171:     }
172: 
173:     switch (command) {
174:       case 'doctor': {
175:         await doctorCommand();
176:         break;
177:       }
178: 
179:       case 'deploy': {
180:         const deployTarget = positional[0];
181:         const deployInput = positional[1];
182: 
183:         if (deployTarget !== 'checkpoint') {
184:           p.log.error('Missing or invalid deploy target. Usage: nimbus deploy checkpoint <checkpoint-id-or-commit-ish>');
185:           process.exit(1);
186:         }
187: 
188:         if (!deployInput) {
189:           p.log.error('Missing checkpoint ID or commit-ish. Usage: nimbus deploy checkpoint <checkpoint-id-or-commit-ish>');
190:           process.exit(1);
191:         }
192: 
193:         const deployOptions = resolveDeployCheckpointOptions(flags);
194:         await deployCheckpointCommand(deployInput, deployOptions);
195:         break;
196:       }
197: 
198:       case 'workspace': {
199:         const workspaceAction = positional[0];
200: 
201:         if (workspaceAction === 'create') {
202:           const input = positional[1];
203:           if (!input) {
204:             p.log.error(
205:               'Missing checkpoint ID or commit-ish. Usage: nimbus workspace create <checkpoint-id-or-commit-ish>'
206:             );
207:             process.exit(1);
208:           }
209: 
210:           const projectRootFlag = flags['project-root'];
211:           const refFlag = flags.ref;
212:           const projectRoot = typeof projectRootFlag === 'string' ? projectRootFlag : undefined;
213:           const ref = typeof refFlag === 'string' ? refFlag : undefined;
214:           await createWorkspaceCommand(input, { ref, projectRoot });
215:           break;
216:         }
217: 
218:         if (workspaceAction === 'show') {
219:           const workspaceId = positional[1];
220:           if (!workspaceId) {
221:             p.log.error('Missing workspace ID. Usage: nimbus workspace show <workspace-id>');
222:             process.exit(1);
223:           }
224: 
225:           await showWorkspaceCommand(workspaceId);
226:           break;
227:         }
228: 
229:         if (workspaceAction === 'destroy') {
230:           const workspaceId = positional[1];
231:           if (!workspaceId) {
232:             p.log.error('Missing workspace ID. Usage: nimbus workspace destroy <workspace-id>');
233:             process.exit(1);
234:           }
235: 
236:           await destroyWorkspaceCommand(workspaceId);
237:           break;
238:         }
239: 
240:         if (workspaceAction === 'files') {
241:           const workspaceId = positional[1];
242:           if (!workspaceId) {
243:             p.log.error('Missing workspace ID. Usage: nimbus workspace files <workspace-id> [path]');
244:             process.exit(1);
245:           }
246: 
247:           const path = positional[2];
248:           await listWorkspaceFilesCommand(workspaceId, path);
249:           break;
250:         }
251: 
252:         if (workspaceAction === 'cat') {
253:           const workspaceId = positional[1];
254:           const path = positional[2];
255:           if (!workspaceId || !path) {
256:             p.log.error('Usage: nimbus workspace cat <workspace-id> <path>');
257:             process.exit(1);
258:           }
259: 
260:           const maxBytes = parsePositiveIntegerFlag(flags['max-bytes']);
261: 
262:           await catWorkspaceFileCommand(workspaceId, path, maxBytes);
263:           break;
264:         }
265: 
266:         if (workspaceAction === 'diff') {
267:           const workspaceId = positional[1];
268:           if (!workspaceId) {
269:             p.log.error('Usage: nimbus workspace diff <workspace-id> [--include-patch] [--max-bytes <n>]');
270:             process.exit(1);
271:           }
272: 
273:           const includePatch = Boolean(flags['include-patch']);
274:           const maxBytes = parsePositiveIntegerFlag(flags['max-bytes']);
275: 
276:           await workspaceDiffCommand(workspaceId, { includePatch, maxBytes });
277:           break;
278:         }
279: 
280:         if (workspaceAction === 'deploy') {
281:           const workspaceId = positional[1];
282:           if (!workspaceId) {
283:             p.log.error('Usage: nimbus workspace deploy <workspace-id>');
284:             process.exit(1);
285:           }
286: 
287:           const idempotencyKeyFlag = flags['idempotency-key'];
288:           const idempotencyKey = typeof idempotencyKeyFlag === 'string' ? idempotencyKeyFlag : undefined;
289:           const pollIntervalMs = parsePositiveIntegerFlag(flags['poll-interval-ms']);
290:           const runTestsIfPresent = !flags['no-tests'];
291:           const runBuildIfPresent = !flags['no-build'];
292:           const preflightOnly = Boolean(flags['preflight-only']);
293:           const autoFix = Boolean(flags['auto-fix']);
294: 
295:           await workspaceDeployCommand(workspaceId, {
296:             idempotencyKey,
297:             runTestsIfPresent,
298:             runBuildIfPresent,
299:             preflightOnly,
300:             autoFix,
301:             pollIntervalMs,
302:           });
303:           break;
304:         }
305: 
306:         p.log.error('Unknown workspace command. Use: create, show, destroy, files, cat, diff, deploy');
307:         process.exit(1);
308:       }
309: 
310:       case 'list': {
311:         await listCommand();
312:         break;
313:       }
314: 
315:       case 'watch': {
316:         const jobId = positional[0];
317:         if (!jobId) {
318:           p.log.error('Missing job ID. Usage: nimbus watch <job-id>');
319:           process.exit(1);
320:         }
321:         await watchCommand(jobId);
322:         break;
323:       }
324: 
325:       default: {
326:         p.log.error(`Unknown command: ${command}`);
327:         p.log.info('Run "nimbus --help" for usage information.');
328:         process.exit(1);
329:       }
330:     }
331:   } catch (error) {
332:     const message = error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error);
333:     p.log.error(message);
334:     process.exit(1);
335:   }
336: }
337: 
338: main();

(End of file - total 338 lines)
</content>

<type>file</type>
<content>1: import * as p from '@clack/prompts';
2: import { getDeployReadiness, getWorkerUrl } from '../lib/api.js';
3: 
4: function checkLine(code: string, ok: boolean, details?: string): string {
5:   return `- ${code}: ${ok ? 'ok' : details ?? 'failed'}`;
6: }
7: 
8: export async function doctorCommand(): Promise<void> {
9:   const workerUrl = getWorkerUrl();
10:   if (!workerUrl) {
11:     throw new Error('NIMBUS_WORKER_URL environment variable is required.');
12:   }
13: 
14:   p.log.message(`Worker URL: ${workerUrl}`);
15: 
16:   let readiness;
17:   try {
18:     readiness = await getDeployReadiness(workerUrl);
19:   } catch (error) {
20:     const message = error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error);
21:     if (message.includes('Worker error (404)')) {
22:       throw new Error(
23:         'Worker is reachable but /api/system/deploy-readiness is missing. Redeploy worker from this branch to get Phase 6 diagnostics.'
24:       );
25:     }
26:     throw error;
27:   }
28: 
29:   p.log.message('Deploy readiness checks:');
30:   for (const check of readiness.checks) {
31:     p.log.message(checkLine(check.code, check.ok, check.details));
32:   }
33: 
34:   if (readiness.ok) {
35:     p.log.success('Worker is ready for workspace deploy testing');
36:     return;
37:   }
38: 
39:   p.log.warning('Worker is not fully ready for workspace deploy testing');
40:   p.log.message('Suggested bootstrap command: `pnpm run setup:worker`');
41:   throw new Error('Doctor checks failed');
42: }

(End of file - total 42 lines)
</content>

<path>/Users/nickdejesus/Code/nimbus/packages/worker/src/api/system.ts</path>
<type>file</type>
<content>1: import type { Env } from '../types.js';
2: import { loadRuntimeFlags } from '../lib/flags.js';
3: 
4: const corsHeaders = {
5:   'Access-Control-Allow-Origin': '*',
6:   'Access-Control-Allow-Methods': 'GET, POST, DELETE, OPTIONS',
7:   'Access-Control-Allow-Headers': 'Content-Type, Idempotency-Key',
8: };
9: 
10: function jsonResponse(body: unknown, status = 200): Response {
11:   return new Response(JSON.stringify(body), {
12:     status,
13:     headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json', ...corsHeaders },
14:   });
15: }
16: 
17: async function getTableColumns(env: Env, tableName: string): Promise<string[]> {
18:   const result = await env.DB.prepare(`PRAGMA table_info(${tableName})`).all<Record<string, unknown>>();
19:   const rows = Array.isArray(result.results) ? result.results : [];
20:   return rows
21:     .map((row) => (typeof row.name === 'string' ? row.name : null))
22:     .filter((value): value is string => Boolean(value));
23: }
24: 
25: async function tableExists(env: Env, tableName: string): Promise<boolean> {
26:   const record = await env.DB.prepare('SELECT name FROM sqlite_master WHERE type = ? AND name = ? LIMIT 1')
27:     .bind('table', tableName)
28:     .first<{ name: string }>();
29:   return Boolean(record?.name);
30: }
31: 
32: export async function handleGetDeployReadiness(env: Env): Promise<Response> {
33:   const checks: Array<{ code: string; ok: boolean; details?: string }> = [];
34: 
35:   checks.push({
36:     code: 'queue_binding_workspace_deploys',
37:     ok: Boolean(env.WORKSPACE_DEPLOYS_QUEUE),
38:     details: env.WORKSPACE_DEPLOYS_QUEUE ? 'binding detected' : 'WORKSPACE_DEPLOYS_QUEUE binding missing',
39:   });
40: 
41:   const deploymentsColumns = await getTableColumns(env, 'workspace_deployments');
42:   const requiredDeploymentColumns = [
43:     'toolchain_json',
44:     'dependency_cache_key',
45:     'dependency_cache_hit',
46:     'remediations_json',
47:   ];
48:   const missingDeploymentColumns = requiredDeploymentColumns.filter((column) => !deploymentsColumns.includes(column));
49:   checks.push({
50:     code: 'migration_workspace_deployments_0008',
51:     ok: missingDeploymentColumns.length === 0,
52:     details:
53:       missingDeploymentColumns.length === 0
54:         ? 'all phase 6 columns present'
55:         : `missing columns: ${missingDeploymentColumns.join(', ')}`,
56:   });
57: 
58:   const dependencyCacheTableExists = await tableExists(env, 'workspace_dependency_caches');
59:   checks.push({
60:     code: 'migration_workspace_dependency_caches_0008',
61:     ok: dependencyCacheTableExists,
62:     details: dependencyCacheTableExists ? 'table exists' : 'workspace_dependency_caches table is missing',
63:   });
64: 
65:   const flags = await loadRuntimeFlags(env);
66:   checks.push({
67:     code: 'runtime_flag_workspace_deploy_enabled',
68:     ok: flags.workspaceDeployEnabled,
69:     details: flags.workspaceDeployEnabled ? 'enabled' : 'disabled',
70:   });
71: 
72:   const ok = checks.every((check) => check.ok);
73:   return jsonResponse({
74:     ok,
75:     checks,
76:   });
77: }

(End of file - total 77 lines)
</content>

<content>1: import { execSync } from 'node:child_process';
2: 
3: function run(command, options = {}) {
4:   execSync(command, {
5:     stdio: 'inherit',
6:     cwd: process.cwd(),
7:     ...options,
8:   });
9: }
10: 
11: function runAllowAlreadyExists(command) {
12:   try {
13:     run(command);
14:   } catch (error) {
15:     const output = String(error?.stderr ?? '') + String(error?.stdout ?? '') + String(error?.message ?? '');
16:     if (output.toLowerCase().includes('already exists')) {
17:       return;
18:     }
19:     throw error;
20:   }
21: }
22: 
23: function main() {
24:   runAllowAlreadyExists('pnpm --filter @dayhaysoos/nimbus-worker exec wrangler queues create nimbus-workspace-deploys');
25:   run('pnpm --filter @dayhaysoos/nimbus-worker exec wrangler d1 migrations apply nimbus-db --remote');
26:   run(
27:     "pnpm --filter @dayhaysoos/nimbus-worker exec wrangler d1 execute nimbus-db --remote --command \"INSERT INTO runtime_flags (key, value, updated_at) VALUES ('workspace_deploy_enabled', 'true', datetime('now')) ON CONFLICT(key) DO UPDATE SET value = excluded.value, updated_at = datetime('now');\""
28:   );
29:   run('pnpm --filter @dayhaysoos/nimbus-worker run deploy');
30: }
31: 
32: main();

(End of file - total 32 lines)
</content>

<path>/Users/nickdejesus/Code/nimbus/packages/cli/src/commands/workspace/deploy.ts</path>
<type>file</type>
<content>1: import * as p from '@clack/prompts';
2: import { createHash } from 'crypto';
3: import {
4:   createWorkspaceDeployment,
5:   getWorkspace,
6:   getWorkerUrl,
7:   getWorkspaceDeployment,
8:   preflightWorkspaceDeployment,
9: } from '../../lib/api.js';
10: 
11: function buildIdempotencyKey(workspaceId: string): string {
12:   const seed = `${workspaceId}:${Date.now()}:${Math.random()}`;
13:   return `deploy-${createHash('sha256').update(seed).digest('hex').slice(0, 20)}`;
14: }
15: 
16: function sleep(ms: number): Promise<void> {
17:   return new Promise((resolve) => setTimeout(resolve, ms));
18: }
19: 
20: export async function workspaceDeployCommand(
21:   workspaceId: string,
22:   options?: {
23:     idempotencyKey?: string;
24:     runTestsIfPresent?: boolean;
25:     runBuildIfPresent?: boolean;
26:     preflightOnly?: boolean;
27:     autoFix?: boolean;
28:     pollIntervalMs?: number;
29:   }
30: ): Promise<void> {
31:   const workerUrl = getWorkerUrl();
32:   if (!workerUrl) {
33:     throw new Error('NIMBUS_WORKER_URL environment variable is required');
34:   }
35: 
36:   const validation = {
37:     runBuildIfPresent: options?.runBuildIfPresent ?? true,
38:     runTestsIfPresent: options?.runTestsIfPresent ?? true,
39:   };
40:   const pollIntervalMs = Math.max(250, options?.pollIntervalMs ?? 1500);
41:   const autoFixEnabled = Boolean(options?.autoFix);
42: 
43:   let preflight;
44:   try {
45:     preflight = await preflightWorkspaceDeployment(workerUrl, workspaceId, {
46:       validation,
47:       autoFix: {
48:         rehydrateBaseline: autoFixEnabled,
49:         bootstrapToolchain: autoFixEnabled,
50:       },
51:     });
52:   } catch (error) {
53:     const message = error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error);
54:     if (message.includes('Worker error (404)')) {
55:       let workspaceReachable = false;
56:       try {
57:         await getWorkspace(workerUrl, workspaceId);
58:         workspaceReachable = true;
59:       } catch {
60:         workspaceReachable = false;
61:       }
62:       if (workspaceReachable) {
63:         throw new Error(
64:           'Deploy routes returned 404 while workspace routes are reachable. Redeploy worker from this branch, then run `pnpm run setup:worker`.'
65:         );
66:       }
67:     }
68:     throw error;
69:   }
70:   const checks = Array.isArray(preflight.preflight.checks) ? preflight.preflight.checks : [];
71:   const toolchain = preflight.preflight.toolchain ?? null;
72:   const remediations = Array.isArray(preflight.preflight.remediations)
73:     ? preflight.preflight.remediations
74:     : [];
75:   p.log.message('Preflight checks:');
76:   for (const check of checks) {
77:     p.log.message(`- ${check.code}: ${check.ok ? 'ok' : check.details ?? 'failed'}`);
78:   }
79:   if (toolchain) {
80:     p.log.message(
81:       `Toolchain: ${toolchain.manager}${toolchain.version ? '@' + toolchain.version : ''} (${toolchain.detectedFrom})`
82:     );
83:   }
84:   if (remediations.length > 0) {
85:     p.log.message('Remediations:');
86:     for (const remediation of remediations) {
87:       p.log.message(`- ${remediation.code}: ${remediation.applied ? 'applied' : remediation.details ?? 'not applied'}`);
88:     }
89:   }
90: 
91:   if (!preflight.preflight.ok) {
92:     p.log.error('Workspace deployment preflight failed');
93:     const failedCheck = checks.find((check) => !check.ok);
94:     if (failedCheck?.code === 'git_baseline' && !autoFixEnabled) {
95:       p.log.warning('Tip: rerun with `--auto-fix` to allow safe baseline rehydrate remediation.');
96:     }
97:     if (preflight.nextAction) {
98:       p.log.warning(`Next action: ${preflight.nextAction}`);
99:     }
100:     throw new Error('Workspace deploy preflight failed');
101:   }
102: 
103:   if (options?.preflightOnly) {
104:     p.log.success('Preflight passed (preflight-only mode)');
105:     return;
106:   }
107: 
108:   p.log.success('Preflight passed');
109:   const idempotencyKey = options?.idempotencyKey?.trim() || buildIdempotencyKey(workspaceId);
110:   const created = await createWorkspaceDeployment(workerUrl, workspaceId, idempotencyKey, {
111:     provider: 'simulated',
112:     validation,
113:     autoFix: {
114:       rehydrateBaseline: autoFixEnabled,
115:       bootstrapToolchain: autoFixEnabled,
116:     },
117:     cache: {
118:       dependencyCache: true,
119:     },
120:     retry: { maxRetries: 2 },
121:     rollbackOnFailure: true,
122:     provenance: {
123:       trigger: 'manual_cli',
124:       taskId: null,
125:       operationId: null,
126:       note: null,
127:     },
128:   });
129: 
130:   const deploymentId = created.deployment.id;
131:   p.log.message(`Deployment queued: ${deploymentId}`);
132: 
133:   while (true) {
134:     await sleep(pollIntervalMs);
135:     const current = await getWorkspaceDeployment(workerUrl, workspaceId, deploymentId);
136:     const status = current.deployment.status;
137:     p.log.message(`Status: ${status}`);
138: 
139:     if (status === 'queued' || status === 'running') {
140:       continue;
141:     }
142: 
143:     if (status === 'succeeded') {
144:       p.log.success(`Deployed URL: ${current.deployment.deployedUrl ?? '(none)'}`);
145:       if (current.deployment.provider === 'simulated') {
146:         p.log.message('Note: simulated provider returns a synthetic URL; no live site is published yet.');
147:       }
148:       return;
149:     }
150: 
151:     const error = current.deployment.error;
152:     if (error) {
153:       p.log.error(`${error.code}: ${error.message}`);
154:     }
155:     if (current.nextAction) {
156:       p.log.warning(`Next action: ${current.nextAction}`);
157:     }
158:     throw new Error(`Workspace deployment ended in non-success status: ${status}`);
159:   }
160: }

(End of file - total 160 lines)
</content>

<type>file</type>
<content>1: import { Sandbox } from '@cloudflare/sandbox';
2: import { handleGetJob, handleListJobs } from './api/jobs.js';
3: import { handleGetJobEvents } from './api/job-events.js';
4: import { handleCreateCheckpointJob } from './api/checkpoint-jobs.js';
5: import {
6:   handleCancelWorkspaceTask,
7:   handleCreateWorkspaceTask,
8:   handleGetWorkspaceTask,
9:   handleGetWorkspaceTaskEvents,
10: } from './api/workspace-tasks.js';
11: import {
12:   handleCancelWorkspaceDeployment,
13:   handleCreateWorkspaceDeployment,
14:   handleGetWorkspaceDeployment,
15:   handleGetWorkspaceDeploymentEvents,
16:   handleWorkspaceDeploymentPreflight,
17: } from './api/workspace-deployments.js';
18: import {
19:   handleCreateWorkspace,
20:   handleCreateWorkspaceGithubFork,
21:   handleCreateWorkspacePatchExport,
22:   handleCreateWorkspaceZipExport,
23:   handleDownloadWorkspaceArtifact,
24:   handleDeleteWorkspace,
25:   handleGetWorkspaceDiff,
26:   handleGetWorkspaceFile,
27:   handleGetWorkspace,
28:   handleGetWorkspaceEvents,
29:   handleGetWorkspaceOperation,
30:   handleListWorkspaceArtifacts,
31:   handleListWorkspaceFiles,
32:   handleResetWorkspace,
33: } from './api/workspaces.js';
34: import { parseCheckpointJobQueueMessage } from './lib/checkpoint-queue.js';
35: import { processCheckpointJob } from './lib/checkpoint-runner.js';
36: import { parseWorkspaceTaskQueueMessage } from './lib/workspace-task-queue.js';
37: import { processWorkspaceTask, shouldRetryWorkspaceTaskError } from './lib/workspace-task-runner.js';
38: import { parseWorkspaceDeploymentQueueMessage } from './lib/workspace-deployment-queue.js';
39: import {
40:   processWorkspaceDeployment,
41:   shouldRetryWorkspaceDeploymentError,
42: } from './lib/workspace-deployment-runner.js';
43: import { handleGetDeployReadiness } from './api/system.js';
44: import type { Env } from './types.js';
45: 
46: // Re-export Sandbox for Durable Object binding
47: export { Sandbox };
48: 
49: // CORS headers for local development
50: const corsHeaders = {
51:   'Access-Control-Allow-Origin': '*',
52:   'Access-Control-Allow-Methods': 'GET, POST, DELETE, OPTIONS',
53:   'Access-Control-Allow-Headers': 'Content-Type, Idempotency-Key',
54: };
55: 
56: export default {
57:   async fetch(request: Request, env: Env, ctx: ExecutionContext): Promise<Response> {
58:     const url = new URL(request.url);
59: 
60:     // Handle CORS preflight
61:     if (request.method === 'OPTIONS') {
62:       return new Response(null, { headers: corsHeaders });
63:     }
64: 
65:     // Route: POST /api/checkpoint/jobs - Create new checkpoint-based deployment job
66:     if (url.pathname === '/api/checkpoint/jobs' && request.method === 'POST') {
67:       return handleCreateCheckpointJob(request, env);
68:     }
69: 
70:     // Route: POST /api/workspaces - Create workspace from checkpoint source bundle
71:     if (url.pathname === '/api/workspaces' && request.method === 'POST') {
72:       return handleCreateWorkspace(request, env);
73:     }
74: 
75:     // Route: GET /api/workspaces/:id/events - List workspace events
76:     const workspaceEventsMatch = url.pathname.match(/^\/api\/workspaces\/([a-z0-9_]+)\/events$/);
77:     if (workspaceEventsMatch && request.method === 'GET') {
78:       return handleGetWorkspaceEvents(workspaceEventsMatch[1], request, env);
79:     }
80: 
81:     // Route: POST /api/workspaces/:id/export/zip - Queue zip export operation
82:     const workspaceZipExportMatch = url.pathname.match(/^\/api\/workspaces\/([a-z0-9_]+)\/export\/zip$/);
83:     if (workspaceZipExportMatch && request.method === 'POST') {
84:       return handleCreateWorkspaceZipExport(workspaceZipExportMatch[1], request, env, ctx);
85:     }
86: 
87:     // Route: POST /api/workspaces/:id/export/patch - Queue patch export operation
88:     const workspacePatchExportMatch = url.pathname.match(/^\/api\/workspaces\/([a-z0-9_]+)\/export\/patch$/);
89:     if (workspacePatchExportMatch && request.method === 'POST') {

91:     }
92: 
93:     // Route: POST /api/workspaces/:id/fork/github - Queue GitHub fork operation
94:     const workspaceForkGithubMatch = url.pathname.match(/^\/api\/workspaces\/([a-z0-9_]+)\/fork\/github$/);
95:     if (workspaceForkGithubMatch && request.method === 'POST') {
96:       return handleCreateWorkspaceGithubFork(workspaceForkGithubMatch[1], request, env, ctx);
97:     }
98: 
99:     // Route: GET /api/workspaces/:id/operations/:operationId - Poll workspace operation status
100:     const workspaceOperationMatch = url.pathname.match(/^\/api\/workspaces\/([a-z0-9_]+)\/operations\/([a-z0-9_]+)$/);
101:     if (workspaceOperationMatch && request.method === 'GET') {
102:       return handleGetWorkspaceOperation(workspaceOperationMatch[1], workspaceOperationMatch[2], env);
103:     }

105:     // Route: GET /api/workspaces/:id/artifacts - List workspace artifacts
106:     const workspaceArtifactsMatch = url.pathname.match(/^\/api\/workspaces\/([a-z0-9_]+)\/artifacts$/);
107:     if (workspaceArtifactsMatch && request.method === 'GET') {
108:       return handleListWorkspaceArtifacts(workspaceArtifactsMatch[1], env);

112:     const workspaceArtifactDownloadMatch = url.pathname.match(
113:       /^\/api\/workspaces\/([a-z0-9_]+)\/artifacts\/([a-z0-9_]+)\/download$/
114:     );
115:     if (workspaceArtifactDownloadMatch && request.method === 'GET') {
116:       return handleDownloadWorkspaceArtifact(
117:         workspaceArtifactDownloadMatch[1],
118:         workspaceArtifactDownloadMatch[2],
119:         request,
120:         env
121:       );
122:     }
123: 
124:     // Route: POST /api/workspaces/:id/tasks - Queue agentic workspace task
125:     const workspaceTasksCreateMatch = url.pathname.match(/^\/api\/workspaces\/([a-z0-9_]+)\/tasks$/);
126:     if (workspaceTasksCreateMatch && request.method === 'POST') {
127:       return handleCreateWorkspaceTask(workspaceTasksCreateMatch[1], request, env, ctx);
128:     }
129: 
130:     // Route: GET /api/workspaces/:id/tasks/:taskId - Poll workspace task status
131:     const workspaceTaskGetMatch = url.pathname.match(/^\/api\/workspaces\/([a-z0-9_]+)\/tasks\/([a-z0-9_]+)$/);
132:     if (workspaceTaskGetMatch && request.method === 'GET') {
133:       return handleGetWorkspaceTask(workspaceTaskGetMatch[1], workspaceTaskGetMatch[2], env);
134:     }
135: 
136:     // Route: GET /api/workspaces/:id/tasks/:taskId/events - Poll workspace task events
137:     const workspaceTaskEventsMatch = url.pathname.match(
138:       /^\/api\/workspaces\/([a-z0-9_]+)\/tasks\/([a-z0-9_]+)\/events$/
139:     );
140:     if (workspaceTaskEventsMatch && request.method === 'GET') {
141:       return handleGetWorkspaceTaskEvents(workspaceTaskEventsMatch[1], workspaceTaskEventsMatch[2], request, env);
142:     }
143: 
144:     // Route: POST /api/workspaces/:id/tasks/:taskId/cancel - Request task cancellation
145:     const workspaceTaskCancelMatch = url.pathname.match(
146:       /^\/api\/workspaces\/([a-z0-9_]+)\/tasks\/([a-z0-9_]+)\/cancel$/
147:     );
148:     if (workspaceTaskCancelMatch && request.method === 'POST') {
149:       return handleCancelWorkspaceTask(workspaceTaskCancelMatch[1], workspaceTaskCancelMatch[2], env);
150:     }
151: 
152:     // Route: POST /api/workspaces/:id/deploy - Queue workspace deployment
153:     const workspaceDeployCreateMatch = url.pathname.match(/^\/api\/workspaces\/([a-z0-9_]+)\/deploy$/);
154:     if (workspaceDeployCreateMatch && request.method === 'POST') {
155:       return handleCreateWorkspaceDeployment(workspaceDeployCreateMatch[1], request, env, ctx);
156:     }
157: 
158:     // Route: POST /api/workspaces/:id/deploy/preflight - Validate deploy readiness
159:     const workspaceDeployPreflightMatch = url.pathname.match(/^\/api\/workspaces\/([a-z0-9_]+)\/deploy\/preflight$/);
160:     if (workspaceDeployPreflightMatch && request.method === 'POST') {
161:       return handleWorkspaceDeploymentPreflight(workspaceDeployPreflightMatch[1], request, env);
162:     }
163: 
164:     // Route: GET /api/workspaces/:id/deployments/:deploymentId - Poll deployment status
165:     const workspaceDeploymentGetMatch = url.pathname.match(/^\/api\/workspaces\/([a-z0-9_]+)\/deployments\/([a-z0-9_]+)$/);
166:     if (workspaceDeploymentGetMatch && request.method === 'GET') {
167:       return handleGetWorkspaceDeployment(workspaceDeploymentGetMatch[1], workspaceDeploymentGetMatch[2], env);
168:     }
169: 
170:     // Route: GET /api/workspaces/:id/deployments/:deploymentId/events - Poll deployment events
171:     const workspaceDeploymentEventsMatch = url.pathname.match(
172:       /^\/api\/workspaces\/([a-z0-9_]+)\/deployments\/([a-z0-9_]+)\/events$/
173:     );
174:     if (workspaceDeploymentEventsMatch && request.method === 'GET') {
175:       return handleGetWorkspaceDeploymentEvents(

179:         env
180:       );

182: 
183:     // Route: POST /api/workspaces/:id/deployments/:deploymentId/cancel - Cancel deployment
184:     const workspaceDeploymentCancelMatch = url.pathname.match(
185:       /^\/api\/workspaces\/([a-z0-9_]+)\/deployments\/([a-z0-9_]+)\/cancel$/
186:     );
187:     if (workspaceDeploymentCancelMatch && request.method === 'POST') {
188:       return handleCancelWorkspaceDeployment(
189:         workspaceDeploymentCancelMatch[1],
190:         workspaceDeploymentCancelMatch[2],
191:         env,
192:         ctx
193:       );
194:     }
195: 
196:     // Route: GET /api/workspaces/:id/files - List files for a path
197:     const workspaceFilesMatch = url.pathname.match(/^\/api\/workspaces\/([a-z0-9_]+)\/files$/);
198:     if (workspaceFilesMatch && request.method === 'GET') {
199:       return handleListWorkspaceFiles(workspaceFilesMatch[1], request, env);
200:     }
201: 
202:     // Route: GET /api/workspaces/:id/file - Read a single file
203:     const workspaceFileMatch = url.pathname.match(/^\/api\/workspaces\/([a-z0-9_]+)\/file$/);

206:     }

212:     }
213: 
214:     // Route: POST /api/workspaces/:id/reset - Reset workspace to baseline source snapshot
215:     const workspaceResetMatch = url.pathname.match(/^\/api\/workspaces\/([a-z0-9_]+)\/reset$/);
216:     if (workspaceResetMatch && request.method === 'POST') {
217:       return handleResetWorkspace(workspaceResetMatch[1], env);
218:     }
219: 
220:     // Route: GET /api/workspaces/:id - Get workspace
221:     // Route: DELETE /api/workspaces/:id - Delete workspace
222:     const workspaceMatch = url.pathname.match(/^\/api\/workspaces\/([a-z0-9_]+)$/);
223:     if (workspaceMatch && request.method === 'GET') {
224:       return handleGetWorkspace(workspaceMatch[1], env);
225:     }
226:     if (workspaceMatch && request.method === 'DELETE') {
227:       return handleDeleteWorkspace(workspaceMatch[1], env);
228:     }
229: 
230:     // Route: GET /api/jobs - List all jobs
231:     if (url.pathname === '/api/jobs' && request.method === 'GET') {
232:       return handleListJobs(env);
233:     }
234: 
235:     // Route: GET /api/jobs/:id - Get job by ID
236:     const jobMatch = url.pathname.match(/^\/api\/jobs\/([a-z0-9_]+)$/);
237:     if (jobMatch && request.method === 'GET') {
238:       return handleGetJob(jobMatch[1], env);
239:     }
240: 
241:     // Route: GET /api/jobs/:id/events - Event stream placeholder
242:     const jobEventsMatch = url.pathname.match(/^\/api\/jobs\/([a-z0-9_]+)\/events$/);
243:     if (jobEventsMatch && request.method === 'GET') {
244:       return handleGetJobEvents(jobEventsMatch[1], request, env);
245:     }
246: 
247:     // Route: GET /health
248:     if (url.pathname === '/health' && request.method === 'GET') {
249:       return new Response(JSON.stringify({ status: 'ok' }), {
250:         headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json', ...corsHeaders },
251:       });
252:     }
253: 
254:     // Route: GET /api/system/deploy-readiness
255:     if (url.pathname === '/api/system/deploy-readiness' && request.method === 'GET') {
256:       return handleGetDeployReadiness(env);
257:     }
258: 
259:     // 404 for unknown routes
260:     return new Response('Not Found', { status: 404, headers: corsHeaders });
261:   },
262: 
263:   async queue(batch: MessageBatch<unknown>, env: Env): Promise<void> {
264:     for (const message of batch.messages) {
265:       const body = message.body as Record<string, unknown> | null;
266:       const type = typeof body?.type === 'string' ? body.type : '';
267: 
268:       if (type === 'workspace_task_created') {
269:         let payload;
270:         try {
271:           payload = parseWorkspaceTaskQueueMessage(message.body);
272:         } catch (error) {
273:           const details = error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error);
274:           console.error(`[workspace-task-queue] invalid message dropped: ${details}`);
275:           continue;
276:         }
277: 
278:         try {
279:           await processWorkspaceTask(env, payload.workspaceId, payload.taskId);
280:         } catch (error) {
281:           const details = error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error);
282:           console.error(`[workspace-task-queue] message handling failed: ${details}`);
283:           if (shouldRetryWorkspaceTaskError(error)) {
284:             message.retry();
285:           }
286:         }
287:         continue;
288:       }
289: 
290:       if (type === 'workspace_deployment_requested') {
291:         let payload;
292:         try {
293:           payload = parseWorkspaceDeploymentQueueMessage(message.body);
294:         } catch (error) {
295:           const details = error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error);
296:           console.error(`[workspace-deploy-queue] invalid message dropped: ${details}`);
297:           continue;
298:         }
299: 
300:         try {
301:           await processWorkspaceDeployment(env, payload.workspaceId, payload.deploymentId);
302:         } catch (error) {
303:           const details = error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error);
304:           console.error(`[workspace-deploy-queue] message handling failed: ${details}`);
305:           if (shouldRetryWorkspaceDeploymentError(error)) {
306:             message.retry();
307:           }
308:         }
309:         continue;
310:       }
311: 
312:       let checkpointPayload;
313:       try {
314:         checkpointPayload = parseCheckpointJobQueueMessage(message.body);
315:       } catch (error) {
316:         const details = error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error);
317:         console.error(`[checkpoint-queue] invalid message dropped: ${details}`);
318:         continue;
319:       }
320: 
321:       try {
322:         await processCheckpointJob(env, checkpointPayload.jobId);
323:       } catch (error) {
324:         const details = error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error);
325:         console.error(`[checkpoint-queue] message handling failed: ${details}`);
326:         message.retry();
327:       }
328:     }
329:   },
330: };

(End of file - total 330 lines)

parts.text:
I reviewed the current working tree changes (CLI deploy/doctor additions, worker system route, setup script, and docs) and ran a repo build with `pnpm -r build`.

No blocking issues found.

- `packages/cli/src/index.ts`, `packages/cli/src/commands/workspace/deploy.ts`, and `packages/cli/src/commands/doctor.ts` look internally consistent; error handling and user guidance paths are coherent.
- `packages/worker/src/api/system.ts` and route wiring in `packages/worker/src/index.ts` are correctly connected for `GET /api/system/deploy-readiness`.
- API/type additions in `packages/cli/src/lib/api.ts` and `packages/cli/src/lib/types.ts` align with usage.
- `scripts/setup-worker.mjs` matches the documented bootstrap flow and is referenced by `package.json`.
- `pnpm -r build` completed successfully (CLI TypeScript build passed).

If you want, I can do a deeper pass next on behavioral edge cases (argument normalization and deploy preflight fallback behavior) with suggested hardening patches.
